title: Size
doc_html:
§3.  Size

Section 3.  The number of members of the legislature shall be provided by law, but the number of senators shall not exceed thirty-nine and the number of representatives, one hundred five.
doc_text:
§3.  Size
Section 3.  The number of members of the legislature shall be provided by law, but the number of senators shall not exceed thirty-nine and the number of representatives, one hundred five.
